name: Oak Park Virtual Golf Club
address: 137 N Oak Park Ave Suite 125, Oak Park, IL 60301
about: The Oak Park Virtual Golf Club is a members-only golf simulator facility located in downtown Oak Park. The club provides exclusive access to its state-of-the-art facility on flexible terms with below-market rates. The space features two golf simulators and includes amenities such as furniture, a kitchenette with a beverage center and sink. The simulators offer training features, golf games, and access to simulated golf courses. The facility is dedicated solely to golf, with no food or drink service offered, allowing it to maintain low costs for members. Membership options include annual, winter, summer month-to-month, and hourly pay-as-you-play plans.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access to the facility, allowing for practice at any time
Below-market membership rates and flexible pricing options
Dedicated golf-only environment with BYOB policy and member refrigerator
Coaching available with experienced PGA and LPGA professionals

food_and_drink.notes: No food service is provided, as the facility is dedicated to golf to keep costs down.
BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) is allowed, and there is a refrigerator available for member use.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state whether club rentals are available, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility is BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) and there is a refrigerator for members' use. However, no food or drink service is provided to keep costs down.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required to play 18 holes, as this can vary depending on the simulator software and player pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Lessons are open to all ages and skill levels, including juniors, indicating the venue is kid-friendly for learning and practice.
